visual_description: An older man with white hair and glasses, dressed in a dark jacket over a white shirt, leans forward and embraces a young child with blonde hair, who wraps his arms around the man's torso. The child reaches up with his left hand while the man holds him close. The scene is dimly lit and takes place indoors.
